drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t
go

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t
	(
	 [token] nvarchar(200),
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [type] bigint
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

--Uncomment the 4 lines below to create a stored procedure for data pipeline orchestration​
--CREATE PROC bulk_load_stg_ino_control_tokens_t
--AS
--BEGIN
COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t
(token 1, memberuid 2, type 3)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Token/Inbound/control_lexisnexis_tokens_combined_final_V3.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 2
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t
(token 1, memberuid 2, type 3)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Token/Inbound/control_lexisnexis_tokens_combined_final_V3_pt2.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 2
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t
go

	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [type] bigint
	)
WITH

--AS
--BEGIN

	,FIRSTROW = 2
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'

GO

COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t
(token 1, memberuid 2, type 3)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Token/Inbound/treatment_lexisnexis_tokens_combined_final_v3_pt2.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 2
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'

GO


SELECT count(*) FROM customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t
GO
--562551

SELECT count(*) FROM customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t
GO
--180794
